facilities.name: Aegis Living Queen Anne Rodgers Park
facilities.description: Aegis Living Queen Anne Rodgers Park is an assisted living and memory care community on Queen Anne Hill in Seattle, across from Rodgers Park. The community offers 88 assisted living apartments and 41 Life's Neighborhood memory care apartments. It is operated by Aegis Living, a Bellevue-based senior living company.

facilities.name: University House Wallingford
facilities.description: University House Wallingford is an Era Living retirement community in Seattle's Wallingford neighborhood, opened in 1997, with 146 one- and two-bedroom apartments. It offers independent living with assisted living services available, a full-service restaurant, and an on-site wellness center staffed by a registered nurse. The community sits within walking distance of Wallingford shops, restaurants, and the library.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Ballard
facilities.description: Merrill Gardens at Ballard is a senior living community in the heart of Seattle's Ballard neighborhood offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. It is operated by Merrill Gardens, a Seattle-based senior living company, and is located near Ballard's shopping, dining, and medical facilities.

facilities.name: Cascades Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Cascades Adult Family Home is a Washington state-licensed adult family home in Bellevue providing residential care and memory care in a home setting. The home is run under the direction of a registered nurse and serves seniors from Bellevue, Seattle, Redmond, and the surrounding Puget Sound area.

facilities.name: Franke Tobey Jones
facilities.description: Franke Tobey Jones is a not-for-profit senior living campus in North Tacoma offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing at its FTJ Care Center. The community has served Tacoma seniors for more than a century and operates as a full-continuum campus near Point Defiance Park.

facilities.name: Rockwood South Hill
facilities.description: Rockwood South Hill is a nonprofit continuing care retirement community (CCRC) on Spokane's South Hill, operated by Rockwood Retirement Communities. It offers independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing on one campus. Rockwood's two Spokane campuses are the only accredited nonprofit CCRCs in the region.

facilities.name: Touchmark on South Hill
facilities.description: Touchmark on South Hill is a full-service retirement community on a 19-acre campus on Spokane's South Hill, near Manito Park. It offers independent living, assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing and rehabilitation, plus home health and home care services. The community is part of Touchmark, a multi-state senior living operator.

facilities.name: Bonaventure of Vancouver
facilities.description: Bonaventure of Vancouver is a senior living community in Vancouver, Washington offering retirement (independent) living, assisted living, and memory care. It is operated by Bonaventure Senior Living, a family-owned company based in Salem, Oregon.

facilities.name: Prestige Senior Living Bridgewood
facilities.description: Prestige Senior Living Bridgewood is an independent and assisted living community in a park-like setting in east Vancouver, Washington, near I-205 between SR-500 and Mill Plain Boulevard. It is operated by Prestige Care, a senior care company headquartered in Vancouver, Washington.

facilities.name: Best Care Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Best Care Adult Family Home is a Washington state-licensed, 6-bed adult family home in Vancouver offering residential senior care in a home setting. Private rooms and semi-private rooms with a private bathroom are available.

facilities.name: Lacamas Creek Post Acute
facilities.description: Lacamas Creek Post Acute is an 83-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Camas, Washington, owned by PACS Group. Formerly operated as Prestige Care and Rehabilitation - Camas, it provides short-term rehabilitation including physical, occupational, and speech therapy, plus wound care and other post-acute services.

facilities.name: Avamere Olympic Rehabilitation of Sequim
facilities.description: Avamere Olympic Rehabilitation of Sequim is a Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility with 125 federally certified beds in Sequim, on Washington's Olympic Peninsula. First certified by CMS in 1989, it is operated by the Avamere Family of Companies.

facilities.name: Bonaventure of East Wenatchee
facilities.description: Bonaventure of East Wenatchee is a senior living community in East Wenatchee, in central Washington, offering retirement (independent) living, assisted living, and memory care. It is operated by Bonaventure Senior Living of Salem, Oregon.

facilities.name: Touchmark at Fairway Village
facilities.description: Touchmark at Fairway Village is a full-service retirement community on an 18-acre campus in east Vancouver, offering independent living cottages and apartments plus assisted living and memory care. Amenities include an indoor pool, fitness center with Parkinson's programming, multiple dining venues, and a theater.

facilities.name: Cogir at The Quarry
facilities.description: Cogir at The Quarry is a large senior living campus at Columbia Tech Center in east Vancouver offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

facilities.name: The Springs at The Waterfront
facilities.description: The Springs at The Waterfront is a 12-story, 360,000-square-foot senior living community on Vancouver's Columbia River waterfront, opened in late 2024. It houses 182 independent living, 48 assisted living, and 20 memory care units for adults 62 and over. Amenities include multiple dining venues, a wine lounge, an indoor pool, and a wellness center.

facilities.name: Cogir of Glenwood Place
facilities.description: Cogir of Glenwood Place (formerly Glenwood Place Senior Living) is a craftsman-style senior living community in the Orchards area of Vancouver with 253 licensed beds.

facilities.name: Highgate at Vancouver
facilities.description: Highgate at Vancouver is a 71-bed licensed assisted living and memory care community in the Hazel Dell neighborhood, near Legacy Salmon Creek Hospital. Assisted living is offered in the Manor while The Cottage provides a separate, secure memory care residence.

facilities.name: Truewood by Merrill, Vancouver
facilities.description: Truewood by Merrill, Vancouver is a pet-friendly independent living community in the Cascade Park area of east Vancouver, offering studio, one-, and two-bedroom apartments. Amenities include a swimming pool, fitness area, theater, billiard lounge, salon, and library.

facilities.name: Mallard Landing by Cogir
facilities.description: Mallard Landing by Cogir is an 85-bed licensed assisted living community in downtown Battle Ground offering assisted living apartments and senior living services including medication management, diabetic care, and higher-acuity support.

facilities.name: Columbia Ridge Senior Living
facilities.description: Columbia Ridge Senior Living is an assisted living community in Washougal with 70 apartment homes in studio and one-bedroom floor plans. The community provides 24/7 support, medication management, therapy services, and social and educational activities in a setting surrounded by outdoor spaces near the Columbia River Gorge.

facilities.name: Hudson Bay Health and Rehabilitation
facilities.description: Hudson Bay Health and Rehabilitation is a 92-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Vancouver operated by Cascadia Healthcare.

facilities.name: Caroline Kline Galland Home
facilities.description: Nonprofit Jewish-heritage skilled nursing and rehabilitation campus on the shores of Lake Washington in Seward Park, serving Seattle since 1914.
facilities.review_note: CMS 5-star overall rating; short-term rehab and long-term care both rated High Performing by U.S. News (July 2026)

facilities.name: Columbia Lutheran Home
facilities.description: One of the Pacific Northwest's longest-operating standalone not-for-profit nursing homes, located in Seattle's Phinney Ridge neighborhood.
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 4 stars (quality measures 4, nursing staffing 4, health inspections 3) as of July 2026

facilities.name: Sunrise of Bellevue
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community in east Bellevue, part of the national Sunrise Senior Living network.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 average across 34 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom; 9.5/10 APFM review score based on 6 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)

facilities.name: Madison House
facilities.description: Independent and assisted living community in Kirkland's Totem Lake area, operated by family-owned Koelsch Communities.

facilities.name: Fairwinds - Redmond
facilities.description: Independent and assisted living retirement community on Avondale Road in Redmond, managed by Seattle-based Leisure Care.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 22 reviews on SeniorAdvisor; Google rating of 4.7 also visible in aggregator summaries (July 2026)

facilities.name: Chateau Bothell Landing
facilities.description: Family-owned senior living community nestled along the Sammamish River Trail in downtown Bothell, offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and respite care. Part of the locally operated Chateau Retirement Communities group serving the Seattle area.

facilities.name: Aegis Living Issaquah
facilities.description: Assisted living and memory care community near downtown Issaquah, part of Bellevue-based Aegis Living. Known for its cottage-style campus of small single-story buildings connected by covered walkways, with well-kept landscaping, scenic views, and outdoor patios at the foot of the Issaquah Alps.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 8 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Renton Centre
facilities.description: Downtown Renton community from Seattle-based Merrill Gardens offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.
facilities.review_note: 9.2/10 A Place for Mom review score with 36 all-time APFM reviews; also 23 reviews on Yelp (July 2026)

facilities.name: Farrington Court
facilities.description: A 62+ independent and assisted living community that has been a cornerstone of Kent for over 50 years, now part of Stellar Senior Living.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 average across 129 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom; 9.8/10 APFM review score based on 37 reviews in the last 2 years (July 2026)

facilities.name: Aljoya Mercer Island
facilities.description: Continuing care retirement community (CCRC) in the town center of Mercer Island, operated by Seattle-based Era Living. Offers independent and assisted living with a large swimming pool, daily fitness programs, maintained gardens, and diverse menus; U.S. News has rated it a Best Senior Living community for independent living.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 average across 9 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.8 rating across 21 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter (July 2026)

facilities.name: Edmonds Landing by Cogir
facilities.description: Independent and assisted living community two blocks from the waterfront in downtown Edmonds, steps from the ferry, shops, and restaurants.

facilities.name: Washington Oakes
facilities.description: Independent and assisted living community in downtown Everett managed by Leisure Care, voted Best Independent Living and Best Assisted Living by U.S. News resident and family surveys.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 average across 37 all-time reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.5 stars on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)

facilities.name: Compassionate Care Adult Family Home LLC
facilities.description: State-licensed six-bed adult family home in south Everett providing 24-hour residential care in a home setting.
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 6 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: America's Best Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Licensed adult family home in Lynnwood serving the Lynnwood and Edmonds area with personalized 24-hour senior care in a residential setting. A small-home alternative to larger assisted living communities, offering individualized attention in a family-style house.
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 5 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Fairwinds - Spokane
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 average across 37 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Fairwinds - Spokane is a large independent and assisted living community on the north side of Spokane, operated by Leisure Care. Residents have access to a library, hair salon, computer room, and a full calendar of outings, live music, and social programs.

facilities.name: Sullivan Park Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 64 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Sullivan Park Assisted Living Community offers assisted living and independent living in Spokane Valley, with a skilled nursing and rehabilitation center (Sullivan Park Care Center) on the same campus.

facilities.name: Broadway Court Estates
facilities.review_note: 9.9/10 A Place for Mom review score from 23 reviews in the last 2 years; 102 total reviews on the platform (July 2026)
facilities.description: Broadway Court Estates is a family-run independent living community in Spokane Valley.

facilities.name: Highgate Senior Living - Yakima
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 123 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Highgate Senior Living - Yakima provides assisted living and a separate secure memory care neighborhood in a quiet residential area on Yakima's west side.

facilities.name: Parkview Estates
facilities.description: Parkview Estates is a 120-bed retirement and assisted living community in Kennewick operated by Regency Pacific.

facilities.name: Regency Canyon Lakes Rehabilitation and Nursing Center
facilities.description: Regency Canyon Lakes is a 53-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in south Kennewick offering short-term rehabilitation, long-term care, and respite stays.

facilities.name: Wenatchee Senior Living by Cogir
facilities.description: Wenatchee Senior Living by Cogir (formerly Avamere at Wenatchee) has welcomed seniors since 1995 and offers independent and assisted living with close-up mountain views.

facilities.name: Summer Wood Alzheimer's Special Care Center
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 average across 13 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Summer Wood Alzheimer's Special Care Center is a dedicated memory care community in Moses Lake serving residents with Alzheimer's disease and other dementias.

facilities.name: Ellensburg Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 194 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Ellensburg Senior Living offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care in a college-town setting near Central Washington University.

facilities.name: Park Manor Rehabilitation Center
facilities.description: Park Manor Rehabilitation Center is a 99-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility in Walla Walla providing short-term rehabilitation and long-term care.

facilities.name: Weatherly Inn Tacoma
facilities.description: Weatherly Inn Tacoma is a family-operated senior living community in north Tacoma offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, adult day stay and respite care.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 94 reviews on Birdeye; 4.5/5 average across 50 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Wright Park
facilities.description: Merrill Gardens at Wright Park offers independent living, assisted living and memory care in Tacoma's Stadium District, next door to Wright Park. Opened in 2022, the community is known for its rooftop Sky Deck with views of Puget Sound, hospitality-style dining and strong social programming.
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 average across 31 reviews on A Place for Mom; 9.8/10 A Place for Mom review score based on 19 recent reviews (July 2026)

facilities.name: Fieldstone Memory Care Puyallup
facilities.description: Fieldstone Memory Care Puyallup is a dedicated memory care community on South Meridian in Puyallup, operated by Washington-based Fieldstone Communities.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 94 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Harbor Place at Cottesmore
facilities.description: Harbor Place at Cottesmore offers 40 independent retirement apartments and 60 assisted living apartments on a Gig Harbor campus shared with a skilled nursing and rehab center, giving residents a continuum of care in one place. Serving seniors since 2006, it was named a 2025 U.S. News Best Assisted and Independent Living community.

facilities.name: The Lodge at Mallard's Landing
facilities.description: The Lodge at Mallard's Landing is a retirement community in Gig Harbor offering independent living cottages plus assisted living, memory care and respite care in a lodge-style main building.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 203 reviews on Birdeye; 4.5/5 across 55 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)

facilities.name: Fieldstone Cooper Point
facilities.description: Fieldstone Cooper Point is a 120-bed independent and assisted living community on Olympia's west side, part of Washington-based Fieldstone Communities.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 37 reviews as shown in senior-living directory listings; 9.1/10 average on SeniorAdvice (July 2026)

facilities.name: Bay Pointe by Cogir
facilities.description: Bay Pointe by Cogir sits on Oyster Bay in Bremerton and has served seniors for more than 20 years, offering independent living, assisted living and the Marine Courte memory care neighborhood.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 average across 46 family reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Liberty Shores Senior Living
facilities.description: Liberty Shores Senior Living is a 112-bed assisted living community with specialized dementia care on Liberty Bay in Poulsbo, one of the area's few locally owned and managed communities.
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 26 Google reviews; 4.3/5 across 28 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Northwoods Lodge
facilities.description: Northwoods Lodge is a 57-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility in Silverdale, established in 1993 and part of the Encore Communities campus.

facilities.name: Canterbury Inn
facilities.description: Canterbury Inn is a Koelsch Communities property in Longview offering independent living, assisted living and memory care, with licensed nurses on site around the clock.

facilities.name: Village Concepts of Chehalis - Woodland Village
facilities.description: Woodland Village is a Village Concepts retirement community in Chehalis offering independent living, assisted living, memory care support and independent senior cottages on an expansive campus.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 19 reviews as shown in senior-living directory listings (July 2026)

facilities.name: Emerald Heights
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 17 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Emerald Heights is a nonprofit Life Care retirement community on a 38-acre wooded campus in Redmond, the first Life Care community in Western Washington (opened 1992). It offers independent living with a full on-campus continuum including assisted living, memory care, and the Corwin Center skilled nursing facility. Amenities include a pool, gym, two dining venues, library, wood shop, walking trails, and a movie theater.

facilities.name: Aegis Living Kirkland Waterfront
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 13 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Aegis Living Kirkland Waterfront is a premium assisted living and memory care community steps from downtown Kirkland with views of Lake Washington.

facilities.name: Sunrise of Edmonds
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 with 21 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026); U.S. News Best Assisted Living and Best Memory Care 2026
facilities.description: Sunrise of Edmonds provides assisted living and memory care near the Edmonds waterfront in Snohomish County. It was recognized as Best Assisted Living and Best Memory Care in U.S. News & World Report's 2026 Best Senior Living ratings.

facilities.name: Harbour Pointe Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 80 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)
facilities.description: Harbour Pointe Senior Living offers assisted living, memory care, and respite care in Mukilteo's Harbour Pointe neighborhood.

facilities.name: Solista Everett by Cogir
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 from 34 reviewers (aggregate shown on chamberofcommerce.com, July 2026); 80 reviews on A Place for Mom
facilities.description: Solista Everett by Cogir (formerly Holiday Cascadian Place) is an all-inclusive independent living community on Colby Avenue in Everett.

facilities.name: Cascades of Bremerton
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 with 78 reviews on SeniorAdvisor; 4.4/5 with 14 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Cascades of Bremerton is a campus-style community offering independent living (The Willows), assisted living, and memory care in East Bremerton.

facilities.name: Village Concepts of Marysville - Grandview Village
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 8 reviews on Birdeye; 25 reviews on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.description: Grandview Village is a Village Concepts retirement community in Marysville offering independent living with assisted living services.

facilities.name: Tri-Cities Senior Living
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 18 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter; 49 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.description: Ciel Senior Living of Tri-Cities is a multi-building campus in Kennewick offering independent living, assisted living, and a dedicated memory care building on North Young Street.

facilities.name: Quail Park of West Seattle
facilities.description: Quail Park of West Seattle opened in 2019 in the West Seattle Junction area and offers enhanced assisted living alongside its Tribute memory care program. The multi-story community holds around 180 apartments and is operated by Seattle-based Living Care Lifestyles.
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 25 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Bridgeport Place
facilities.description: Bridgeport Place is an independent living, assisted living, and memory care community on Bridgeport Way in University Place, just west of Tacoma.

facilities.name: Judson Park
facilities.description: Judson Park is a nonprofit continuing care retirement community overlooking Puget Sound in Des Moines, operated by HumanGood. The campus offers independent living, assisted living, memory care, and a 96-bed Medicare-certified health center, and holds a three-year CARF accreditation.

facilities.name: Josephine Caring Community
facilities.description: Josephine Caring Community is a nonprofit senior care campus in Stanwood offering skilled nursing, short-term rehabilitation, memory care, and assisted living.

facilities.name: Fairwinds - Brittany Park
facilities.description: Fairwinds - Brittany Park is a Leisure Care retirement community in the heart of Woodinville offering independent living and assisted living. U.S.
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 overall experience across 32 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Olympic Place by Bonaventure
facilities.description: Olympic Place by Bonaventure has served Snohomish County seniors since 2004, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care in a quiet Arlington neighborhood within walking distance of shopping.
facilities.review_note: 4.2/5 across 47 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Warm Beach Senior Community
facilities.description: Warm Beach Senior Community is a faith-based, not-for-profit continuing care community established in 1967 on a 90-acre campus near Stanwood, affiliated with the Free Methodist Church. It combines independent cottages and apartments with assisted living, memory care, and skilled nursing, and residents cite more than two dozen resident clubs and comparatively affordable rates.
facilities.review_note: 4.6/5 across 29 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: Panorama
facilities.description: Panorama is a nonprofit continuing care retirement community spanning more than 140 acres in Lacey, with over 850 homes plus assisted living and skilled nursing on campus. Amenities include an aquatic and fitness center, auditorium, resident-run TV station, and an unusually deep roster of clubs and activities.

facilities.name: Merrill Gardens at Auburn
facilities.description: Merrill Gardens at Auburn sits in downtown Auburn steps from shops and transit, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

facilities.name: Sunrise of Issaquah
facilities.description: Sunrise of Issaquah is a 107-bed assisted living and memory care community on the Issaquah-Fall City Road, recognized by U.S. News as Best Assisted Living and Best Memory Care for 2026.
facilities.review_note: 4.8/5 across 50 reviews on Birdeye; 4.7 Google rating (July 2026)

facilities.name: Bonaventure of the Tri-Cities
facilities.description: Bonaventure of the Tri-Cities is a 123-bed independent living, assisted living, and memory care community in Richland's Bellerive area. The campus features a swimming pool, walking paths, landscaped grounds, and a salon.
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 overall experience across 34 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)

facilities.name: Wheatland Village
facilities.description: Wheatland Village is a Generations family-operated retirement campus in Walla Walla offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. The community includes a swimming pool, hot tub, gym, chapel, movie theater, library, and ice cream parlor.

facilities.name: The Hampton at Salmon Creek
facilities.description: The Hampton at Salmon Creek is a 68-bed secured memory care community in Vancouver's Salmon Creek neighborhood, purpose-built for residents living with Alzheimer's and other dementias. Operated by family-owned Koelsch Communities, it offers 24-hour staffing, music therapy, and dementia-specific programming.
facilities.review_note: 4.7/5 across 31 reviews on AssistedLivingCenter.com (July 2026)

facilities.name: Kenmore Senior Living
facilities.description: Kenmore Senior Living, formerly Spring Estates, offers independent living, assisted living, and memory care near the north end of Lake Washington. Residents cite chef-prepared meals three times a day, life-enrichment programming, and a friendly resident community.
facilities.review_note: 4.4/5 across 77 reviews on A Place for Mom; 4.5/5 across 125 reviews on Birdeye (July 2026)

facilities.name: Vineyard Park of Sumner
facilities.description: Stafford Suites Sumner is an assisted living community in Sumner where staff assist with daily-living needs from medication management to bathing and dressing.
facilities.review_note: 4.5/5 across 16 reviews on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)

facilities.name: NobleCare Adult Family Home
facilities.description: NobleCare Adult Family Home is a six-bed, RN-supported adult family home in Bothell where each private bedroom has its own bathroom and opens onto a shared great room.

facilities.name: eliseo
facilities.description: Eliseo (formerly Tacoma Lutheran Retirement Community) is a nonprofit continuing-care retirement community on a 20-acre campus offering independent living, assisted living, memory care and skilled nursing.

facilities.name: Olympia Transitional Care and Rehabilitation
facilities.description: A 113-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing and rehabilitation center in Olympia offering short-term post-acute rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: The Oaks at Timberline
facilities.description: An 85-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility in Vancouver providing short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Regency at Northpointe
facilities.description: A 120-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center in north Spokane offering short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Good Samaritan Health Care Center
facilities.organization_name: The Evangelical Lutheran Good Samaritan Society
facilities.description: A 105-bed nonprofit skilled nursing facility in Yakima operated by the Evangelical Lutheran Good Samaritan Society, offering short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: South Hill Rehabilitation and Care Center
facilities.description: A 113-bed nonprofit skilled nursing and rehabilitation center on Spokane's South Hill offering short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Vancouver Specialty and Rehabilitative Care
facilities.description: A 104-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility in Vancouver providing short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Redmond Care and Rehabilitation Center
facilities.description: A 139-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center near Kirkland, part of the Ensign Group, offering short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Marianwood Health & Rehabilitation
facilities.description: The only nonprofit skilled nursing and rehabilitation facility in the Issaquah/Sammamish area, operated by Providence, offering short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Marysville Care Center
facilities.description: A 97-bed skilled nursing facility in Marysville offering short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: Avalon Care Center - Federal Way
facilities.description: A 120-bed skilled nursing and rehabilitation center in Federal Way offering short-term rehab and long-term care.

facilities.name: The Bellettini
facilities.description: A luxury independent and assisted living community in downtown Bellevue with 144 apartments, two restaurants, a fitness center and salon, operated by MBK Senior Living.

facilities.name: MorningStar of Kirkland
facilities.description: A MorningStar Senior Living community in Kirkland offering independent and assisted living with stylish apartments and hospitality-focused amenities.

facilities.name: Orchard Crest Retirement Community
facilities.review_note: 4.3/5 across 15 reviews on Caring.com (2026)
facilities.description: An established independent and assisted living retirement community in Spokane Valley, celebrating over 25 years of operation, offering apartments, dining and activity programming.

facilities.name: Sunny's Adult Family Home LLC
facilities.description: A 6-bed licensed adult family home in the Lake Sammamish area of Bellevue, owned and operated by a registered nurse, providing 24-hour specialized care including support for Alzheimer's, Parkinson's and dementia.

facilities.name: Titlow Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Titlow Adult Family Home is a licensed six-bed adult family home in Tacoma's Titlow Park neighborhood, near the beach and walking trails. It provides memory care and personal care services in a small residential setting. The owner is noted by families for attentive, hands-on involvement with each resident.
facilities.review_note: 9.5/10 review score across 6 reviews on A Place for Mom, and rated 5.0/5 'Excellent' on SeniorAdvisor (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with an above-average review reputation (A Place for Mom review score 9.5/10 across 6 reviews) and a memory-care focus.

facilities.name: Divine Home Health Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Divine Home Health Adult Family Home is a six-bed licensed adult family home near Lake Sammamish in Bellevue, with six private bedrooms and private bathrooms. It offers memory care and 24-hour care in a home-like setting. The provider has more than a decade of caregiving experience.
facilities.review_note: 9.5/10 review score based on 3 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home run by an experienced provider (about 11 years) with a memory-care focus and a strong A Place for Mom review score (9.5/10).

facilities.name: Sunny Loving Care Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Sunny Loving Care Adult Family Home is a licensed five-bed adult family home in Lynnwood. It provides personal care, medication management, meals and 24-hour supervision, with a focus on memory care for residents with Alzheimer's and dementia.
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed five-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 Google rating across 4 reviews and a memory-care focus.

facilities.name: Twin Lake Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Twin Lake Adult Family Home is a licensed six-bed adult family home in Federal Way, set beside a golf course. It offers memory care and personal care in a small, home-like setting with hands-on daily involvement from the owner and caregivers.
facilities.review_note: 6 reviews averaging 5.0/5 overall experience on A Place for Mom (9/10 review score based on 5 recent reviews), July 2026
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 average across 6 A Place for Mom reviews and a memory-care focus.

facilities.name: All Saints Adult Family Home
facilities.description: All Saints Adult Family Home is a family-owned, licensed six-bed adult family home in Federal Way offering 24-hour memory care in a home with private rooms and gardens. The owner has more than 14 years of geriatric care experience, and caregivers are trained in dementia and Alzheimer's care.
facilities.review_note: 4 reviews averaging 5.0/5 overall experience on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 average across 4 A Place for Mom reviews, a memory-care focus, and an owner with 14+ years of geriatric care experience.

facilities.name: Bridle Trails Senior Care
facilities.description: Bridle Trails Senior Care is a licensed adult family home in Kirkland's Bridle Trails neighborhood, owned and managed by a Washington-licensed registered nurse. It specializes in Alzheimer's and dementia care, hospice, and nursing services in a peaceful, home-like setting for up to six residents.
facilities.review_note: 10 reviews on A Place for Mom (listed as Alpine Residences of Bridle Trails), with an above-average local reputation (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed adult family home run by a registered nurse with roughly 20 years of geriatric experience, a memory-care specialty, and 10 A Place for Mom reviews.

facilities.name: At Serenity Adult Family Home
facilities.description: At Serenity Adult Family Home is a licensed six-bed adult family home in Auburn operating since 2005. It is certified by Washington DSHS for both Dementia Specialty and Mental Health Specialty care and provides 24-hour supervision.
facilities.review_note: 8 reviews averaging 5.0/5 overall experience on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed adult family home operating since 2005 with DSHS Dementia and Mental Health specialty certifications and a 5.0/5 average across 8 A Place for Mom reviews.

facilities.name: Elderly Home Care
facilities.description: Elderly Home Care is a licensed six-bed adult family home in Bothell owned and operated by Veronica Dudau, a healthcare professional with more than 20 years of long-term care experience. It offers assisted living and memory care with a high caregiver-to-resident ratio.
facilities.review_note: 7 reviews averaging 5.0/5 overall experience on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 average across 7 A Place for Mom reviews and an owner with 20+ years of long-term care experience.

facilities.name: Victoria 1 Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Victoria 1 Adult Family Home is a licensed adult family home in Seattle's Lake City area providing memory care and 24-hour supervision. The provider, Maria Corbu, is a certified nursing assistant with specialty training in Alzheimer's, dementia and mental health and more than 10 years of experience.
facilities.review_note: 5.0/5 across 5 reviews on SeniorAdvisor; 4 reviews averaging 5.0/5 on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed adult family home with a 5.0/5 rating across 5 SeniorAdvisor reviews and a provider trained in dementia care with 10+ years of experience.

facilities.name: Namaste Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Namaste Adult Family Home is a licensed six-bed adult family home in Kent, family-owned and operated by a husband-and-wife team. It provides personal care, medication management, meals and 24-hour supervision in a home-like setting.
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 Google rating across 6 reviews.

facilities.name: Always With Love Care
facilities.description: Always With Love Care is a licensed three-bed adult family home in Kent offering personal care, medication management, meals and 24-hour supervision in an intimate home setting.
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed three-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 Google rating across 4 reviews.

facilities.name: Providence Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Providence Adult Family Home is a licensed six-bed adult family home in north Spokane owned and operated by Angela and Vasile Codreanu. It offers a home-like setting with 24-hour awake staff, many specially trained in Alzheimer's and dementia care, and handicap-accessible bathrooms.
facilities.review_note: 9.8/10 'Most Loved' review score based on 6 reviews on A Place for Mom; 5.0/5 on Caring.com (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a memory-care focus and a top A Place for Mom review score (9.8/10, 'Most Loved') across 6 reviews.

facilities.name: Grace Senior Care of Issaquah
facilities.description: Grace Senior Care of Issaquah is a licensed adult family home for up to six residents, set on a private acre and a half in the Issaquah Highlands area near I-90. Each resident has a private room and bathroom, with hands-on care from providers Michelle and Alex Lupse, who have offered senior care in Issaquah for many years.
facilities.review_note: 4 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with positive A Place for Mom reviews and long-standing local operation by the same providers.

facilities.name: Caring Arms Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Caring Arms Adult Family Home is a licensed six-bed adult family home in the South Hill area of Puyallup, offering six private rooms in a newly remodeled house. It provides assisted living and Alzheimer's care and accepts Medicaid and Veteran benefits.
facilities.review_note: 7 reviews averaging 5.0/5 overall experience on A Place for Mom (July 2026)
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 average across 7 A Place for Mom reviews and an Alzheimer's-care focus.

facilities.name: Ravancho AFH
facilities.description: Ravancho AFH is a licensed six-bed adult family home in Olympia providing Alzheimer's care and assisted living across a range of care levels. It offers a small, home-like setting with 24-hour care.
facilities.review_note: 4.9/5 average across 9 reviews on A Place for Mom (9.5/10 review score based on recent reviews), July 2026
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a 4.9/5 average across 9 A Place for Mom reviews and a memory-care focus.

facilities.name: Assurety Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Assurety Adult Family Home is a licensed six-bed adult family home in Vancouver, overseen by owners Jim and Laura. It offers assisted living, Alzheimer's and memory care, nursing, and hospice care in a home setting with 24-hour supervision.
facilities.quality_basis: Washington-licensed six-bed adult family home with a 5.0/5 Google rating across 18 reviews and a memory-care focus; public records show its license renewed in 2023 with no cited deficiencies.

facilities.name: IRIS Adult Family Home
facilities.description: IRIS is a licensed 6-bed adult family home in Vancouver that has operated since 1999, with staff trained in memory care, high-acuity care and medication management. Aggregator listings describe it as a memory care and residential care home serving residents with dementia.
facilities.review_note: A Place for Mom 22 reviews all-time averaging 4.2/5; SeniorAdvisor 4.0 stars with 15 reviews (as of July 2026).
facilities.quality_basis: Operating since 1999 (25+ years) with an extensive multi-platform review history (22 A Place for Mom reviews averaging 4.2/5).

facilities.name: Camas Hills Care Home
facilities.description: Camas Hills Care Home is a licensed 6-bed adult family home in Camas, family-owned and operated since 2010. It offers six private suites with private bathrooms and states specialized training in mental health and dementia, caring for all levels including hospice.
facilities.review_note: Google 5.0 stars from 2 reviews; A Place for Mom lists 14 reviews (as of July 2026).
facilities.quality_basis: In operation since 2010 (15+ years) with 14 reviews aggregated on A Place for Mom and a 5.0 Google rating (small review count).

facilities.name: Abelia I Senior Home
facilities.description: Abelia I Senior Home is a licensed 6-bed adult family home in Everett operated by Abelia Senior Services LLC. It provides personal care, medication management, family-style meals and 24-hour supervision in a home setting.
facilities.quality_basis: Rated 5.0 stars from 5 Google reviews per aggregator listing; licensed 6-bed adult family home.

facilities.name: Idyllic Adult Family Home
facilities.description: Idyllic Adult Family Home is a licensed 6-bed adult family home in Snohomish offering private rooms and 24-hour awake CNA staffing. Listings describe a care focus on mental health and dementia, with nutritious meals and recreational activities.
facilities.review_note: SeniorAdvisor 4.5 stars with 5 reviews; A Place for Mom shows 5 reviews averaging 4.7/5 (as of July 2026).
facilities.quality_basis: SeniorAdvisor 4.5-star rating and A Place for Mom 4.7/5 average, each across 5 reviews.

facilities.name: SIM Adult Family Home
facilities.description: SIM Adult Family Home is a licensed 6-bed adult family home in Olympia specializing in dementia care, hospice and long-term care, with 24/7 caregivers and nurses on staff for medication administration. It sits in a quiet residential area of northwest Olympia.
facilities.review_note: Yelp 5.0 stars from 4 reviews (as of July 2026); review sentiment is mixed across platforms.
facilities.quality_basis: Yelp 5.0 rating across 4 reviews; state license number 752887 cited in a directory listing.

facilities.name: Bellingham Adult Family Homes LLC
facilities.description: Bellingham Adult Family Homes LLC is a licensed 6-bed adult family home in Bellingham owned by Tony and Claudia Anton, located near Bloedel Donovan and Whatcom Falls parks. Listings note specialized behavior support and services for mental health and dementia.
facilities.review_note: Birdeye 5.0 stars from 3 reviews (as of July 2026), including a family who kept both parents there for several years.
facilities.quality_basis: Birdeye 5.0 rating across 3 reviews describing multi-year family stays.

facilities.name: Spokane Health & Rehabilitation
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 2/5 stars (health inspection 1 star, staffing 2 stars, quality measures 5 stars), per public CMS Care Compare data reported by carelistings.com (July 2026).
facilities.description: Spokane Health & Rehabilitation is a Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility with 125 beds at 6025 N Assembly St in Spokane. It offers short-term rehabilitation and long-term skilled nursing care.
facilities.concern_status: Active per current CMS Care Compare data — confirm current status directly

facilities.name: Franklin Hills Health & Rehab Center
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 2/5 stars, compared to a Washington state average of about 3.54 stars, per nursinghomesite.com/medicarelist.com CMS-sourced data (July 2026). KING5 news coverage of Washington's lowest-rated nursing homes also named this facility as receiving 1-star ratings on the health-inspection and staffing components.
facilities.description: Franklin Hills Health & Rehab Center is a 100-bed, for-profit skilled nursing facility at 6021 N Lidgerwood St in Spokane that has served the area since 1960. It provides short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care and participates in Medicare and Medicaid.

facilities.name: Paramount Rehabilitation and Nursing
facilities.review_note: Current CMS overall rating 2/5 stars, versus a Washington-average of about 3.62/5, per local-nursing-homes.com CMS-sourced data (July 2026). This facility is a designated CMS Special Focus Facility (SFF) — a federal program for nursing homes with a documented history of serious, recurring quality problems that receive additional oversight. U.S. HHS has also listed it among the nation's lowest-performing nursing homes.
facilities.description: Paramount Rehabilitation and Nursing is a 165-bed Medicare- and Medicaid-certified skilled nursing facility at 2611 S Dearborn St in Seattle. It is designated a Special Focus Facility (SFF) by CMS, a program that targets nursing homes with a documented pattern of serious quality problems for more frequent inspections.
facilities.serious_concern_note: A federal CMS Special Focus Facility — nursing homes selected by CMS for extra oversight due to a documented history of serious quality problems.
facilities.concern_status: Active per current CMS Care Compare data — confirm current status directly

facilities.name: Everett Center
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 1/5 stars. For at least one month between August 2024 and July 2025, CMS designated this facility for additional inspections due to a documented pattern of poor care, and it has paid three fines totaling $456,759 over the last three years, per data reported by familyassets.com (accessed July 2026).
facilities.description: Everett Center is a 100-bed, for-profit skilled nursing facility operated by Genesis HealthCare at 1919 112th St SW in Everett. It provides nursing care, short-term rehabilitation, and respite care.

facilities.name: Woodard Creek Health & Rehabilitation
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 1/5 stars — listed by assistedlivingmagazine.com under the explicit heading "1-Star Nursing Home in Olympia, WA" (July 2026 data). Distinct facility from Olympia Transitional Care and Rehabilitation (430 Lilly Rd NE), which is under related ownership but a separate CCN and address.
facilities.description: Woodard Creek Health & Rehabilitation is a 152-bed skilled nursing facility at 3333 Ensign Rd NE in Olympia, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. It is Medicare- and Medicaid-certified.

facilities.name: Fir Lane Care
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 1/5 stars, below the Washington average of about 3.3, with a 1-star health-inspection sub-rating. Reported quality measures include long-stay antipsychotic medication use at 34.4% (vs. WA average 15.2%) and high-risk pressure ulcers at 10.6% (vs. WA average 4.5%), per CMS-sourced aggregator data (July 2026). The same data shows nursing staffing hours above the national average.
facilities.description: Fir Lane Care (also known as Fir Lane Health & Rehabilitation Center) is a 135-bed, for-profit skilled nursing facility at 2430 N 13th St in Shelton, offering long-term skilled nursing and short-term rehabilitation. It is owned by Caldera Care.

facilities.name: Shelton Health and Rehabilitation
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 1/5 stars, per nursinghomedatabase.com CMS-sourced data (July 2026); Shelton was named among the cities with 1-star Washington nursing homes in KING5's statewide news coverage.
facilities.description: Shelton Health and Rehabilitation is a 76-bed skilled nursing facility at 153 Johns Ct in Shelton offering 24-hour skilled nursing, long-term residential care, short-term rehabilitation, and memory-care programming. It is Medicare- and Medicaid-certified.

facilities.name: Life Care Center of Kennewick
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 2/5 stars, per nursinghomesite.com/medicarelist.com CMS-sourced data (July 2026). Certified for Medicare and Medicaid participation since June 1, 1974.
facilities.description: Life Care Center of Kennewick is a 136-bed, for-profit skilled nursing facility at 1508 W 7th Ave in Kennewick, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. It is operated by Life Care Centers of America.

facilities.name: Bridge Crest Post Acute
facilities.review_note: Public CMS-data aggregators disagree on the exact current overall star rating for this facility — healthcare4ppl.com reports 2/5 stars overall, while other sites report figures ranging from 2 to 4 stars; one source separately notes a 4-star CMS staffing sub-rating (all accessed July 2026). Because of this inconsistency we are not asserting a single overall star number here; families should check CMS Care Compare directly for the current rating.
facilities.description: Bridge Crest Post Acute is an 89-bed skilled nursing facility at 5220 NE Hazel Dell Ave in Vancouver, operated by PACS Group, offering short-term rehabilitation and long-term nursing care. It is Medicare- and Medicaid-certified.

facilities.name: Life Care Center of Mount Vernon
facilities.review_note: CMS overall rating 2/5 stars, per medicarelist.com/medicare.gov CMS-sourced data (July 2026).
facilities.description: Life Care Center of Mount Vernon is a 121-bed skilled nursing facility at 2120 E Division St in Mount Vernon, operated by Life Care Centers of America. It provides short-term rehabilitation and long-term skilled nursing care and is Medicare- and Medicaid-certified.

facilities.name: Highgate Senior Living - Bellingham
facilities.review_note: 3.4/5 across 7 reviews, per a Bellingham-market senior-living aggregator summary (July 2026); this is below the ~4.0/5 average reported for Bellingham assisted living overall.
facilities.description: Highgate Senior Living - Bellingham is a 77-apartment senior living community at 155 E Kellogg Rd in Bellingham offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care. It is licensed with the State of Washington.

facilities.name: Greenlake Senior Living Renton
facilities.review_note: Reported Google-type rating of approximately 2.7/5. Separately, 16 reviews on A Place for Mom (as "Renton Assisted Living") average 2.8/5 for overall experience (July 2026 aggregator data). Reviews are described as highly polarized but skewing negative, with recurring reports of understaffing, inconsistent medication administration, unprofessional staff conduct, and facility maintenance issues, alongside a minority of positive reviews citing friendly staff and a clean environment.
facilities.description: Greenlake Senior Living Renton (also marketed as Renton Assisted Living) is an assisted living and memory care community at 71 SW Victoria St in Renton, located near the south end of Lake Washington and managed by Brookdale-affiliated ownership. It offers private and companion apartments.

facilities.name: Fairview Assisted Living Inc
facilities.review_note: Only 2 reviews are recorded on Caring.com as of July 2026. Family reviews on record include serious allegations of mistreatment and an unresponsive management team, while other aggregator sites (SeniorAdvisor.com, AssistedLivingCenter.com) separately show higher composite ratings of roughly 4.0-4.5/5 — the evidence is thin in volume and mixed in tone.
facilities.description: Fairview Assisted Living Inc is a 64-resident assisted living facility at 1617 N Calispel St in Spokane, licensed by the State of Washington. It offers personal care, meals, and daily activities including a barber/beauty shop and library.

facilities.name: Aspen Quality Care
facilities.review_note: A Place for Mom score: 8 reviews averaging 3.9/5 for overall experience (July 2026). Reviews are mixed, with families citing a family-like environment and quality care alongside separate reports of cleanliness concerns, slow response times, and pricing complaints.
facilities.description: Aspen Quality Care is a 21-bed Enhanced Assisted Living Facility at 9626 N Colfax Rd in Spokane, specializing in Alzheimer's/dementia care, mental health care, and diabetic care management. It is licensed by the State of Washington.

facilities.name: Maple Creek of Lakewood
facilities.review_note: Seniorly's proprietary community score is 6.0/10 (July 2026). Opinions in family reviews vary sharply: a subset describe the facility as neglectful of residents and critical of management (including one review characterizing conditions as "horrible"), while other reviewers praise the staff and overall experience.
facilities.description: Maple Creek of Lakewood (Maple Creek Senior Living) is a 75-bed assisted living facility at 10420 Gravelly Lake Dr SW in Lakewood, licensed by the State of Washington with 24-hour staff.

facilities.name: Parkside Retirement Community
facilities.review_note: 4.0/5 across 4 reviews on Caring.com; separately 2 reviews on A Place for Mom (July 2026). Caring for seniors at this location since 1973; owned by Noble Healthcare.
facilities.description: Parkside Retirement Community is a 94-bed senior living campus at 2902 I St NE in Auburn offering independent living, assisted living, memory care, and hospice/respite support. It has operated since 1973 and is owned by Noble Healthcare.

facilities.name: Fort Vancouver Assisted Living
facilities.review_note: A Place for Mom: 5 reviews averaging 2.1/5 for overall experience. SeniorAdvisor.com separately shows a 2.0/5 rating from 5 reviews (both accessed July 2026). Reviews mention concerns about cleanliness, responsiveness to resident needs, and facility conditions, alongside some praise for care and amenities.
facilities.description: Fort Vancouver Assisted Living is an assisted living community at 8422 NE 8th Way in Vancouver. It is licensed by the State of Washington.

facilities.name: Vineyard Park at Bremerton Senior Living
facilities.review_note: A Place for Mom: 40 reviews averaging 4.0/5 for overall experience (July 2026), just under the site's 4.2 quality threshold. Recent reviews describe consistent understaffing since CarePartners took over management in November 2023, alongside longstanding positive reviews dating to when the community was known simply as Vineyard Park (serving the area since 1984).
facilities.description: Vineyard Park at Bremerton Senior Living is a senior living campus at 2707 Clare Ave in Bremerton offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care, serving the Bremerton, Silverdale, Poulsbo, and Port Orchard area since 1984. It is currently managed by CarePartners Senior Living.

facilities.name: Everett Plaza
facilities.review_note: Other platforms show different figures for the same community: Birdeye lists 3.1/5 from 30 reviews and Caring.com lists 5 reviews; family reviews report chronic understaffing, missed bathing, and food-quality complaints alongside some positive accounts.
facilities.description: Everett Plaza is an independent and assisted living community at 2204 12th St in Everett offering 24-hour caregiver support.

facilities.name: Kadie Glen Assisted Living
facilities.review_note: Ratings differ sharply by platform: AssistedLivingCenter.com shows 4.7/5, while Seniorly's proprietary score is only 4.5/10 (July 2026). Reviews describe outstanding service and thoughtful amenities alongside separate complaints of uncleaned shared bathrooms and worn furniture. Operated by Ridgeline Management Company.
facilities.description: Kadie Glen Assisted Living is an assisted living community at 451 N Baker Ave in East Wenatchee operated by Ridgeline Management Company. It is open 24 hours and licensed by the State of Washington.

organizations.name: Aegis Living
organizations.description: Aegis Living is a privately held, family-owned senior living company headquartered in Bellevue, Washington. It operates roughly three dozen assisted living and memory care communities in Washington, California, and Nevada, with additional communities in development. The company is known for design-forward buildings and its Life's Neighborhood memory care program.

organizations.name: Era Living
organizations.description: Era Living is a private, Seattle-based company founded by Eli and Rebecca Almo that opened its first retirement community in 1987. It manages eight retirement communities in the greater Seattle area, including University House Wallingford (1997), Ida Culver House Broadview (1990), and The Lakeshore (1995). The company partners with the University of Washington Retirement Association.

organizations.name: Bonaventure Senior Living
organizations.description: Bonaventure Senior Living is a family-owned senior living company based in Salem, Oregon. It operates roughly 35 communities offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care, with its largest concentrations in Oregon and Washington and additional communities in Colorado, Idaho, and Montana.

organizations.name: Avamere
organizations.description: The Avamere Family of Companies, founded in 1995 and headquartered in Wilsonville, Oregon, began as a single nursing facility in Hillsboro, Oregon. It operates nearly 50 independent living, assisted living, transitional care, and skilled nursing facilities, concentrated in Oregon, Washington, and Colorado, along with ancillary companies providing rehabilitation, home health, and hospice services.

organizations.name: Touchmark
organizations.description: Touchmark is a family-owned senior living company founded in 1980 and headquartered in Beaverton, Oregon. It develops and operates full-service, resort-style retirement communities offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care in eight U.S. states and Canada.

organizations.name: Cogir Senior Living
organizations.description: Cogir Senior Living is the U.S. senior housing arm of Montreal-based Cogir Real Estate, with its U.S. headquarters in Scottsdale, Arizona. After merging with Cadence Living, the company grew from about a dozen U.S. communities in 2020 to nearly 100 communities totaling roughly 11,000 units, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care.

organizations.name: The Springs Living
organizations.description: The Springs Living is a family-owned senior living company headquartered in McMinnville, Oregon. It owns and operates about 20 communities in Oregon, Washington, and Montana, offering independent living, assisted living, and memory care with a focus on aging in place.

organizations.name: Highgate Senior Living
organizations.description: Highgate Senior Living is a senior living operator headquartered in Issaquah, Washington, with more than 25 years of history. It operates assisted living and memory care communities across Washington, Montana, Arizona, and California, with a whole-person 'Wellness in Aging' care philosophy.

organizations.name: Cascadia Healthcare
organizations.description: Cascadia Healthcare is a post-acute care company headquartered in Eagle, Idaho. It operates skilled nursing and rehabilitation facilities across the Pacific Northwest and Mountain West, including Hudson Bay Health and Rehabilitation in Vancouver and Brookfield Health and Rehabilitation in Battle Ground, Washington.

organizations.name: Emerald Communities
organizations.description: Emerald Communities is a nonprofit operator of Pacific Northwest life plan (CCRC) communities, including Emerald Heights in Redmond and Heron's Key in Gig Harbor. Its communities offer a full continuum from independent living through skilled nursing under a Life Care contract model.

organizations.name: Sunrise Senior Living
organizations.description: Sunrise Senior Living, founded in 1981, is one of the largest senior living providers in North America, operating hundreds of communities across the United States, Canada, and the United Kingdom. Its communities focus on assisted living and memory care in residential-style buildings.

organizations.name: Cascade Living Group
organizations.description: Cascade Living Group is a Washington-based senior living operator managing roughly 40 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities across the western United States, including Cascades of Bremerton in Washington and Cascades of the Sierra in Nevada.

organizations.name: Village Concepts
organizations.description: Village Concepts is a family-owned Washington senior housing operator founded in 1975, running more than a dozen retirement, assisted living, and adult family home communities across the state. Its portfolio emphasizes mid-priced, community-oriented retirement living in smaller Washington cities.

organizations.name: Ciel Senior Living
organizations.description: Ciel Senior Living is a senior housing management company operating independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in several states, including the multi-building Ciel of Tri-Cities campus in Kennewick, Washington.

organizations.name: Atria Senior Living
organizations.description: Atria Senior Living is one of the largest senior living operators in the United States, managing independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities in more than 40 states. Its portfolio includes Atria Summit Ridge in Reno, Nevada.

organizations.name: Leisure Care
organizations.description: Leisure Care is a Seattle-based senior living company that has developed and managed retirement communities for over 30 years, operating roughly 50 independent living, assisted living, and memory care communities, largely in the western United States, under brands including Fairwinds.

organizations.name: Prestige Care
organizations.description: Prestige Care is a family-owned senior care company based in Vancouver, Washington, operating skilled nursing centers and senior living communities across eight western states. Its portfolio includes assisted living communities such as Legends Park in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho.

organizations.name: HumanGood
organizations.description: HumanGood is one of the largest nonprofit senior living providers in the country, formed in 2016 through the merger of American Baptist Homes of the West and be.group. It operates life plan communities and affordable housing across multiple states, including Judson Park in Des Moines, Washington.

organizations.name: Koelsch Communities
organizations.description: Koelsch Communities is a family-owned senior living company founded in 1958 and headquartered in Olympia, Washington. It operates 39 communities across eight states with a strong specialty in dedicated memory care, including its Hampton-branded memory care communities.

organizations.name: Living Care Lifestyles
organizations.description: Living Care Lifestyles is a Seattle-area senior living operator best known for its Quail Park communities, which offer assisted living and Tribute-branded memory care. The company runs Quail Park campuses in Washington and other western states.

organizations.name: Generations
organizations.description: Generations is a family-owned and family-operated senior living company based in Portland, Oregon, running communities in several western states. Its campuses, including Wheatland Village in Walla Walla, typically combine independent living, assisted living, and memory care with resort-style amenities.

organizations.name: The Ensign Group
organizations.description: The Ensign Group is a large holding company whose independently operated subsidiaries provide skilled nursing, rehabilitation and senior living services across many U.S. states, including Washington.

organizations.name: Providence
organizations.description: Providence is a large nonprofit Catholic health system operating hospitals, clinics and senior care facilities across the western United States, including skilled nursing and rehabilitation services in Washington.

organizations.name: The Evangelical Lutheran Good Samaritan Society
organizations.description: The Good Samaritan Society is one of the largest nonprofit providers of senior care and services in the United States, operating skilled nursing, rehabilitation and senior living communities, including in Washington.

organizations.name: MBK Senior Living
organizations.description: MBK Senior Living develops and operates independent living, assisted living and memory care communities across the western United States, including in Washington.

organizations.name: MorningStar Senior Living
organizations.description: MorningStar Senior Living operates independent living, assisted living and memory care communities across the western United States, including several in Washington.
